gameTitle: Street Fighter II: The World Warrior

achievements.title: The Journey Continues
achievements.description: Beat the game as Ryu on difficulty level 3 or higher
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Master of the Hadouken
achievements.description: Beat the game using only Ryu on difficulty level 7
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Gimme a Break - Sign
achievements.description: Break the background object in Ryu's stage in 1-player mode
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Gimme a Break - Crate
achievements.description: Break the background object in Guile's stage  in 1-player mode
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Gimme a Break - Barrel
achievements.description: Break the background object in Ken's stage in 1-player mode
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Gimme a Break - Statue
achievements.description: Break the background object in M. Bison's stage in 1-player mode
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Another Brick in the Wall
achievements.description: Clear the first bonus stage
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Another Brick in the Wall (Part 2)
achievements.description: Clear the first bonus stage with 20 seconds or more left on the timer
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Fast and Furious
achievements.description: Clear the second bonus stage
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
achievements.description: Clear the second bonus stage with 20 seconds or more left on the timer
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Score Beginner
achievements.description: Score over 50,000 points in 1-player mode without using any continues
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Score Warrior
achievements.description: Score over 200,000 points in 1-player mode without using any continues
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Score Champion
achievements.description: Score over 800,000 points in 1-player mode without using any continues
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Vital Victory
achievements.description: Get a Perfect on any of the 8 playable characters on difficulty level 7
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Stomping Out Shadaloo
achievements.description: Get a Perfect on any of the 3 sub-bosses on difficulty level 7
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: Destroying the Dictator
achievements.description: Get a Perfect on M. Bison on difficulty level 7
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh

achievements.title: True World Warrior
achievements.description: Beat the game on difficulty level 7 without using any continues
achievements.author: SamuraiGoroh
